channel.title: AI Daily Digest
channel.description: Daily AI newsletter briefing -- the signal, not the noise. Synthesized from 30+ newsletters every morning.
channel.itunes:author: Bronson Elliott

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 21, 2026
item.description: Daily AI newsletter briefing for April 21, 2026.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 20, 2026
item.description: Daily AI newsletter briefing for April 20, 2026.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 19, 2026
item.description: Claude Design lands as the weekend's top story (4 newsletters lead with it), pairing with Opus 4.7 to make Anthropic's full-stack builder pitch. OpenAI ships Codex on the desktop with computer-use; Cerebras moves toward IPO. Chrome AI Mode puts a Gemini pane next to every page. Luma launches Innovative Dreams, an AI production company, with a Ben Kingsley Moses film for Prime Video. Anthropic Signal: emotion-concepts paper draws a sharp Mike Elgan critique on framing. Agent infrastructure splits off from human infrastructure: Karpathy Loop, Ghost (Tiger Data) MCP-native Postgres, NVIDIA's local-agent guide on DGX Spark. Plus: Altman home attack, robotics roundup, Text2SQL vs semantic layer, and an AI Reality Check prompt worth running.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 18, 2026
item.description: Claude Opus 4.7 doubles down on Sonnet's "delegate-don't-micromanage" gospel. OpenAI Codex leaves the terminal for the desktop with a mono-thread memory pattern. Claude Design + Figma board drama and an Anthropic CPO departure. Perplexity debuts a "Personal Computer." Infrastructure and memory pipes get loud: Cloudflare, Ollama 0.21 + Hermes, Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, Ternary Bonsai. The physical bill comes due: NAACP vs. xAI Memphis, OpenAI + Cerebras $20B. Plus: Moonshot Kimi, Windsurf 2.0, Chrome AI Mode, GPT-Rosalind, Meta pivoting from open weights, a $70M AI movie, and a through-line on who owns the desktop, the memory, the chips, and pays the power bill.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 17, 2026
item.description: Claude Opus 4.7 ships. OpenAI turns Codex into a superapp. Allbirds becomes NewBird AI. Gemini lands on Mac. Anthropic Mythos still withheld but federal agencies reportedly testing it. GPT-Rosalind goes vertical into life sciences. BBVA builds 20,000 custom GPTs.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 16, 2026
item.description: Daily AI newsletter briefing for April 16, 2026.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 15, 2026
item.description: OpenAI leaked memo attacks Anthropic. Sam Altman Molotov attack and Stanford AI Index explain the AI populism crisis. Meta builds AI Zuckerberg clone. Anthropic Mythos triggers emergency bank CEO briefings. Microsoft builds OpenClaw competitor. Claude Cowork goes GA.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 14, 2026
item.description: Stanford AI Index exposes massive insider-vs-public perception gap. Harness engineering emerges as the new discipline. Dark code crisis hits Amazon. Anthropic explores custom chips, Mythos triggers Fed bank CEO summit, Claude Code gets Coordinator Mode. DeepMind maps AI agent web traps. Local models roundup: Qwen 3.5 leads.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 13, 2026
item.description: White House pushes Claude Mythos on Wall Street for cybersecurity. MirrorCode benchmark shows AI doing weeks-long coding tasks autonomously. Google merges NotebookLM into Gemini. Claude lands in Microsoft Word, Anthropic explores custom chips, and "Claude Mania" dominates HumanX.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 12, 2026
item.description: Anthropic's Mythos breach triggers emergency Treasury-Fed-Wall Street meeting. Google's TurboQuant compresses KV cache 6x with zero accuracy loss. Slack ships Claude-powered Slackbot overhaul with reusable AI skills and MCP routing.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 11, 2026
item.description: Claude Mythos Preview finds thousands of zero-days, Anthropic launches Project Glasswing. Enterprise AI crosses 54% agent deployment but leadership crisis deepens. Perplexity connects to bank accounts via Plaid.

item.title: AI Daily Digest - April 10, 2026
item.description: Anthropic's Mythos Preview finds 27-year-old security flaws. Meta abandons open source with Muse Spark. Anthropic ships Managed Agents, Advisor, Monitor, and Cowork GA.
